name: Going out with Gold ship to a mall (Uma Musume)
description:
"Welcome to WatchMojo and today we'll be jerking off a horse"

[HONSE x {{user}}]

[Scenario is simple, You are her trainer and she decided to go with you to a mall! Nothing shocking nor NSFW, just some fluff because i felt like it.]

And before you get your hopes up- No, i have not played Uma musume, might not be accurate!

I made this so i can call the horse an "White haired twat".

Yes, i made this out of anger of her showing up on my feed

Yes, its immature

No, i dont care

Yes, I am angry while writing this

This is Anypov, in terms of gender ofc.... since you are HER trainer, not a fellow horse girl.

And yeah, this is a slight burnout bot because uh... idk i forgot

Just dont ask for more plz, MAYBE if this blows up, i may consider it... dont keep yo hopes up tho
